mnemonics: CIE = Constantly Improving Evaluator. Think of a machine that is always learning and improving its own evaluation process, just like continuous evaluation.
keyPoints: Continuous evaluation provides ongoing feedback for model improvement.
It helps in early detection of model degradation or concept drift.
The process often involves automated retraining pipelines to maintain model performance.
commonMistakes: Confusing continuous evaluation with final model evaluation or A/B testing.
Failing to set up proper monitoring and alerting for performance metrics.
Not having a rollback strategy if the newly retrained model performs worse.
